title: Girlfriend of Steel questions
wikitext:
[]: Girlfriend of Steel questions             Quote Post by Ark » Sun Oct 19, 2008 4:44 am Hi there. I have two questions about Girlfriend of Steel. Firstly does anyone know the name of the song that plays during the ending credits? Secondly I recently downloaded a fansubbed version of girlfriend of steel and watched/played it. http://tendou.wordpress.com/2006/08/22/evangelion-pc-game-girlfriend-of-steel-fan-translated/ I used daemon tools to launch the iso file and download the programme. I've deleted the iso file now but I am still able to play the game. When I press the uninstall icon it asks me to insert Disk A but obviously I don't have a disk. How do I uninstall it? When I do a search for files with the name "evangelion" or "girlfriend of steel" it doesn't find anything. Many thanks

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Sun Oct 19, 2008 4:46 am daemon tools still has the iso bound to the drive. you'll need to unbind it if you want to get rid of the game altogether.

[]:             Quote Post by Ark » Sun Oct 19, 2008 6:27 am NemZ wrote: daemon tools still has the iso bound to the drive. you'll need to unbind it if you want to get rid of the game altogether.

[]: Re: Girlfriend of Steel questions             Quote Post by pen^2 » Sun Oct 19, 2008 9:37 pm Ark wrote: Firstly does anyone know the name of the song that plays during the ending credits?

[]:             Quote Post by The Bastard King » Mon Oct 20, 2008 2:15 am Click on the Daemon tools symbol on your taskbar, and unmount the ISO.

[]:             Quote Post by Ark » Mon Oct 20, 2008 3:46 am The Bastard King wrote: Click on the Daemon tools symbol on your taskbar, and unmount the ISO.

[]:             Quote Post by Ark » Thu Oct 23, 2008 2:10 pm I managed to solve the problem. Thanks for the help.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Thu Oct 23, 2008 4:01 pm so what was the problem and how did you solve it?

[]:             Quote Post by Ark » Fri Oct 24, 2008 5:58 am NemZ wrote: so what was the problem and how did you solve it?

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Fri Oct 24, 2008 11:11 am ahh... some sort of registry error. a registry cleaner may have taken care of that as well, in retrospect.

[]:             Quote Post by Ark » Fri Oct 24, 2008 12:34 pm NemZ wrote: ahh... some sort of registry error. a registry cleaner may have taken care of that as well, in retrospect.

[]:             Quote Post by tinmeigut » Tue Feb 03, 2009 10:59 am Having set aside the game for a few years, I decided to play it on Windows Vista, an obviously unwise move because it took me two days straight to find a suitable Chinese Encoding program (otherwise it's all mojibake). It's worth it though, I love this side story, especially the 'Asuka ending' ;)

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Tue Feb 03, 2009 4:49 pm Thanks to the link provided by Ark I have installed the game. ...Now what? How do I open it? When I click into the virtual drive it takes me to the installation menu again. Then I looked in my C drive and saw a folder titled "Eva95". But there was no file to let me play the game... Am I doing something wrong? EDIT: Nevermind. I found it! *playing now* Wow Asuka nude on a balcony? What a way to start a game! :O

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Tue Feb 03, 2009 7:41 pm Alright, someone tell me how to get the different endings. I got the one where Shinji says he will be waiting for Mana. This is a very sad yet funny game..movie.thing. MOAR!

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Feb 03, 2009 7:56 pm I forget the order, but to get the Asuka ending you select "I'm worried about Asuka". The other 2 endings are Mana-based (although the special edition includes a 4th ending that's also Mana/Shinji).

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Tue Feb 03, 2009 7:58 pm Thank you SSD, The Asuka in this game reminds me of someone..This is such a sweet story.. I knew there were walk troughs but I didn't want to read them. I was not trying to be literal but guess that I failed on that end. Thank you none the less

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Tue Feb 03, 2009 7:59 pm Otakon 08 Ikari wrote: Alright, someone tell me how to get the different endings. I got the one where Shinji says he will be waiting for Mana.

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Tue Feb 03, 2009 8:43 pm Might you have a download for Girlfriend of Steel 2..Or is it just a book..I'm rather out of it on this matter. I've got all of Angelic Days..

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Wed Feb 04, 2009 7:23 am Angelic Days is based on Girlfriend of Steel 2 I chose the Asuka ending. I could really care less about the Mana endings because she was more of a plot device then a character. No offense to anyone who may favor Mana. Right now I am googling to see if there is a GoS2 fansubbed game. I want to see the ShinjiXRei ending without spoiling it for myself on youtube. EDIT: Can't find ;(

[]:             Quote Post by Great Genius Shinji-Sama » Wed Feb 04, 2009 4:00 pm Can you tell me where i could possibly find a walkthrough of the special edition for GOS; or at least if possible, videos for the 4 endings?
